headline: 🚨 Tesla quietly buries $2B AI hardware acquisition in 10-Q — unnamed company disclosed in a single sentence; never mentioned on earnings call; $1.8B contingent on service/performance milestones; could accelerate Optimus or FSD chip roadmap

⚠️ TSLA closes ~$372, -3.7% post-earnings — CFO confirms negative free cash flow for rest of 2026; $25B capex ($5B above prior guidance) covers 6 new factories; Fortune: 'earned next to nothing on cars in Q1'; -17% YTD
source: Fortune / Yahoo Finance / The Next Web

headline: ⚠️ Musk confirms HW3 CANNOT achieve Unsupervised FSD — 'simply does not have the capability'; only 1/8 the memory bandwidth of HW4; v14 Lite (supervised) coming to HW3 by end of June
Musk: Optimus external sales 'probably next year' (2027) — shifts timeline from Q4 2026; says Optimus will be 'useful outside of Tesla sometime next year'
Musk on earnings call: New Roadster could debut 'in a month or so' — first concrete timeline signal in years; unexpected acceleration from 2027 to possible Q2/Q3 2026 reveal
Musk targets unsupervised FSD in 'a dozen or so states' by year-end 2026 — but cautions it 'won't be super material this year'; safety improvement remains prerequisite for scaling
source: CNBC / Business Insider / Q1 2026 Earnings Call

headline: Tesla Q1 2026 BEAT: Revenue $22.38B (+16% YoY), non-GAAP EPS $0.41 (+52% YoY) vs $0.37 est, gross margin 21.1% (+478 bps YoY), FCF $1.4B (+117% YoY) — strongest margins in years
⚠️ Tesla quietly slips 5-city robotaxi 1H 2026 timelines — Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Las Vegas now 'preparations underway' with no firm date; only Dallas + Houston confirmed live
source: Electrek / Business Insider / Tesla Q1 Deck
